data.body: EPIC review round 2 = PASS + SIGNED (8 advisories). Applied the one genuine coherence fix: anchored child d4cf (G7 leaf-plan parent-containment) as an explicit 4th calibration workstream in epic Context + a 4th Success Criterion (was absent from epic body — cited by advisories G3/G4/G5/ISF up to 0.85). Justified skips: AC2/AC3 are intentional epic-orchestrator deliverables (not child-decomposable); b9c0 AC4's contingency on 9f25's derived threshold (<=0.54/0.60) carried forward into b9c0 impl; ac0e/e1f2 CLAUDE.md ordering handled by sequential stacking. Re-running epic review to re-sign current plan.
